title: Spotify
description:
Welcome to Spotify, the ultimate music streaming platform designed for music lovers everywhere.

Key Features:
- Access over 100 million songs and 5 million podcasts.
- Create unlimited playlists and share them with friends.
- High-quality audio streaming up to 320kbps.
- Offline listening mode for Premium subscribers.
- Personalized Daily Mixes and Discover Weekly.

Privacy & Security:
We value your privacy. Your listening data is encrypted.
We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

System Requirements:
iOS 14.0 or later, Android 5.0 or later.
Minimum 100MB free storage space required.

Support:
24/7 customer support available via in-app chat.
Visit our help center for troubleshooting guides.

title: Notion
description:
Notion is the all-in-one workspace for your notes, tasks, wikis, and databases.

Key Features:
- Drag-and-drop interface for easy organization.
- Real-time collaboration with team members.
- Customizable templates for every use case.
- Integrated calendar and task management.
- Sync across all devices instantly.

Privacy & Security:
Enterprise-grade security with SOC 2 compliance.
Two-factor authentication available for all accounts.

System Requirements:
Web browser or desktop app for Mac/Windows.
Stable internet connection for real-time sync.

Support:
Extensive knowledge base and community forum.
Email support available for Premium plans.

title: Duolingo
description:
Learn a new language for free with fun, bite-sized lessons.

Key Features:
- 40+ languages including Spanish, French, and Japanese.
- Gamified learning with streaks and leaderboards.
- Speaking and listening exercises with AI feedback.
- Offline lessons available for Super Duolingo.
- Personalized learning path based on your goals.

Privacy & Security:
Your progress is saved securely to your account.
We comply with GDPR and CCPA regulations.

System Requirements:
iOS 15.0 or Android 6.0 minimum.
Microphone access required for speaking exercises.

Support:
Help center available in 10 languages.
In-app reporting for bug fixes and suggestions.

title: Figma
description:
The collaborative interface design tool for modern teams.

Key Features:
- Real-time multiplayer editing for designers.
- Prototyping tools with interactive components.
- Design systems and shared libraries.
- Developer handoff with code snippets.
- Plugin ecosystem for extended functionality.

Privacy & Security:
Data encrypted in transit and at rest.
Granular permission settings for files and teams.

System Requirements:
Chrome, Firefox, or Edge browser recommended.
Desktop app available for Mac and Windows.

Support:
Community forum with active designers.
Professional support for Enterprise contracts.

title: Slack
description:
Team communication and collaboration hub for modern work.

Key Features:
- Organized channels for topics and projects.
- Direct messages and group huddles.
- 2,000+ integrations with tools like Google Drive.
- File sharing and search functionality.
- Haptic feedback and notification customization.

Privacy & Security:
Enterprise Key Management available.
Data residency options for global compliance.

System Requirements:
Desktop app for macOS, Windows, Linux.
Mobile app for iOS and Android.

Support:
24/7 support for Enterprise Grid customers.
Slack Help Center with extensive documentation.

title: Todoist
description:
The world's #1 task manager and to-do list app.

Key Features:
- Natural language processing for quick entry.
- Recurring tasks and deadline reminders.
- Project templates and labels for organization.
- Karma system to track productivity trends.
- Integration with calendar and email apps.

Privacy & Security:
End-to-end encryption for Premium users.
Regular security audits and penetration testing.

System Requirements:
Works on any device with a web browser.
Native apps for all major platforms.

Support:
Email support with 24-hour response time.
Community forums for tips and tricks.

title: Canva
description:
Design anything with thousands of templates.

Key Features:
- Drag-and-drop editor for non-designers.
- Millions of stock photos and icons.
- Brand Kit for consistent company branding.
- Video editing and animation tools.
- Print products and direct delivery.

Privacy & Security:
Content ownership remains with the creator.
Secure payment processing for subscriptions.

System Requirements:
Internet connection required for cloud saving.
Minimum 4GB RAM recommended for video editing.

Support:
24/7 customer support via chat.
Canva Design School for learning resources.

title: Obsidian
description:
A powerful knowledge base that works on local Markdown files.

Key Features:
- Bidirectional links for connected thoughts.
- Graph view to visualize knowledge networks.
- Hundreds of community plugins.
- Local storage ensures data ownership.
- Customizable CSS themes.

Privacy & Security:
Your data stays on your device.
No cloud sync required unless you choose it.

System Requirements:
Windows 10, macOS 10.13, or Linux.
Mobile apps for iOS and Android.

Support:
Active community forum and Discord.
Documentation wiki for advanced usage.

title: Linear
description:
Streamline software projects and bug tracking.

Key Features:
- Keyboard-first navigation for speed.
- Automated workflows and cycles.
- Git integration for commit tracking.
- Custom views and filters.
- Performance optimized for large teams.

Privacy & Security:
SOC 2 Type II certified.
Private workspaces for sensitive projects.

System Requirements:
Web app or desktop client.
Best experienced on desktop browsers.

Support:
Intercom chat support within the app.
Public roadmap for feature requests.

title: Headspace
description:
Meditation and mindfulness made simple.

Key Features:
- Guided sessions for sleep and focus.
- Sleep sounds and nightcasts.
- Mindful exercises for kids.
- Progress tracking and streaks.
- Offline downloads for travel.

Privacy & Security:
Health data integration with Apple Health.
Secure account management.

System Requirements:
iOS 14.0 or Android 8.0 minimum.
Headphones recommended for best experience.

Support:
Help center with meditation guides.
Email support for subscription issues.

title: Arc Browser
description:
The browser that works for you — not the other way around.

Key Features:
- Spaces for organizing different contexts.
- Split view for multitasking.
- Boosts to customize website appearance.
- Built-in ad and tracker blocking.
- Vertical tabs for better screen usage.

Privacy & Security:
No tracking of browsing history.
Local data processing for features.

System Requirements:
macOS 12.0 or later (Windows in beta).
Minimum 8GB RAM recommended.

Support:
Community Discord server.
Feedback form directly in the browser.

title: Raycast
description:
Supercharged productivity launcher for Mac.

Key Features:
- Search apps, files, and commands instantly.
- Run scripts and manage snippets.
- Control Spotify and system settings.
- Hundreds of community extensions.
- Customizable themes and appearance.

Privacy & Security:
Open source extensions for transparency.
No data collection without consent.

System Requirements:
macOS 12.0 or later.
Keyboard shortcut customization available.

Support:
Documentation and API for developers.
Community Slack for troubleshooting.

title: Grammarly
description:
AI-powered writing assistant that checks grammar and tone.

Key Features:
- Real-time spelling and grammar checks.
- Clarity and engagement suggestions.
- Tone detection for professional writing.
- Works in emails, docs, and social media.
- Plagiarism detector for Premium users.

Privacy & Security:
Does not store sensitive information.
GDPR and CCPA compliant.

System Requirements:
Browser extension for Chrome, Safari, Edge.
Desktop app for Windows and Mac.

Support:
Knowledge base with writing tips.
Email support for account management.

title: Loom
description:
Record and share video messages instantly.

Key Features:
- Screen and camera recording.
- Instant sharing via link.
- Viewer analytics and engagement.
- Drawing tools for emphasis.
- Integration with Slack and Gmail.

Privacy & Security:
Password protection for videos.
Domain restriction for enterprise.

System Requirements:
Chrome extension or desktop app.
Microphone and camera access required.

Support:
Video tutorials for onboarding.
Support ticket system for issues.

title: Craft Docs
description:
Beautiful, fast document editor for Mac and iOS.

Key Features:
- Native performance and rich formatting.
- Daily notes and backlinks.
- Collaborative editing in real-time.
- Export to PDF, Word, and HTML.
- Dark mode and custom themes.

Privacy & Security:
End-to-end encryption for docs.
Local first architecture.

System Requirements:
iOS 15.0 or macOS 11.0 minimum.
iCloud sync required for cross-device.

Support:
Community forum for users.
Direct email support for feedback.

title: Miro
description:
Online collaborative whiteboard platform for teams.

Key Features:
- Infinite canvas for brainstorming.
- Mind maps and flowcharts.
- Sticky notes and voting sessions.
- Templates for agile and design.
- Video chat integration.

Privacy & Security:
Enterprise security controls.
Data residency options.

System Requirements:
Web browser or desktop app.
Tablet support for iPad and Android.

Support:
Miro Academy for training.
24/7 support for Enterprise plans.

title: Superhuman
description:
The fastest email experience ever made.

Key Features:
- AI triage for important emails.
- Keyboard shortcuts for everything.
- Split inbox for better focus.
- Read statuses and follow-ups.
- Scheduled send and snooze.

Privacy & Security:
SOC 2 compliant infrastructure.
No scanning of email content for ads.

System Requirements:
Web app or Mac desktop client.
Gmail or Office 365 integration.

Support:
Onboarding session with every user.
Concierge support via email.

title: Windsurf
description:
AI-powered code editor with deep context awareness.

Key Features:
- Agentic AI assistant for coding.
- Understands entire codebase context.
- Auto-complete and refactoring.
- Debugging assistance.
- Supports multiple languages.

Privacy & Security:
Code data not used for training.
Enterprise privacy controls.

System Requirements:
Windows, Mac, or Linux.
Minimum 16GB RAM for large projects.

Support:
Discord community for developers.
Documentation for API usage.

title: Notion Calendar
description:
A beautifully designed calendar app that connects your time and work.

Key Features:
- Sync with Google Calendar.
- View Notion tasks alongside events.
- Block focus time easily.
- Quick meeting scheduling.
- Time zone management.

Privacy & Security:
Secure OAuth connection.
No data sold to third parties.

System Requirements:
Mac desktop app or Web.
iOS app for mobile scheduling.

Support:
Help center integrated with Notion.
Community templates for scheduling.

title: Perplexity
description:
AI-powered answer engine that searches the web in real time.

Key Features:
- Accurate answers with citations.
- Real-time web search.
- Follow-up questions for depth.
- File upload for analysis.
- Pro search for complex queries.

Privacy & Security:
Anonymous search mode available.
Data deletion options.

System Requirements:
Web app or mobile iOS/Android.
Internet connection required.

Support:
FAQ section on website.
Feedback button in app interface.
